candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Cost of goods sold
candidates.why: Appears directly beneath the selected parent row 'Cost of goods sold' and reads as a sub-component of that total, so adding it separately would likely double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Right-of-Use Assets in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: COGS-related D&A row, but it is presented as a component within the cost of revenues/COGS section under the selected total 'Cost of goods sold', so it appears already embedded.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Explicit amortization within cost of revenues; positioned as a sub-component of the selected COGS total rather than a separate same-level operating line.
Label suggests COGS-related amortization, but the row is blank and also appears to be a component-level disclosure within COGS rather than a separate add-on line.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is the reported total row 'Cost of goods sold'. The visible COGS D&A rows sit underneath that total as component disclosures, so they should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Sales and marketing expenses
candidates.why: Presented directly under the selected parent row 'Sales and marketing expenses', indicating it is a component already contained in that selected bucket.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Right-of-Use Assets in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Although explicit, it is shown within the SG&A area as a component disclosure tied to selected operating expense rows, not as a separate same-level line to add on top of them.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of intangible-Sales and marketing expenses
candidates.why: Sales-and-marketing-specific amortization shown as a sub-component beneath the selected sales and marketing total, so separately adding it would double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Research and development expenses
candidates.why: R&D-specific depreciation is nested under the selected 'Research and development expenses' line, and R&D is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so it should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Right-of-Use Assets in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: R&D D&A component under the selected R&D expense row; because R&D is already explicitly selected for both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, adding this separately is not appropriate.

candidates.row_label: Amortization in Research and development expenses
candidates.why: Explicit R&D amortization, but it is a component of the selected R&D expense row and falls under the special rule to avoid separately adding R&D D&A when the R&D line is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in General and administrative expenses
candidates.why: Nested beneath the selected parent row 'General and administrative expenses', so it appears already included in that total.

candidates.row_label: Amortization in General and administrative expenses
candidates.why: G&A-specific amortization shown as a component under the selected G&A total, so it should not be added separately.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket is the sum of 'Sales and marketing expenses', 'Research and development expenses', and 'General and administrative expenses'. The SG&A/R&D D&A rows shown are subordinate component disclosures within those selected totals, not separate same-level operating lines. R&D is also already selected in XRD, so R&D-related D&A should not be added separately.
